title: Lobelia lucaeana
taxonomy: Lobelia lucaeana is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This plant is a member of the Lobelia genus and is known for its unique characteristics. The Lobelia genus is further divided into several sections, with Lobelia lucaeana belonging to one of these sections. The Campanulaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants, commonly known as bellflowers. As a member of this family, Lobelia lucaeana shares certain characteristics with other species within the Campanulaceae.
